_note: Manually transcribed from a browser tab that still had this board rendered client-side, after the 2026-07-02 production data-loss incident (see CONTEXT.md). This is a FALLBACK source, not authoritative — if the apps-platform team's point-in-time clone recovery succeeds, use that instead (it will have real emails, exact timestamps, and image URLs this transcription cannot capture). All 17 posts now recovered: Gabriel's image post recovered from his own ~/Downloads (copied to recovery/images/); Steven's and Matia's image-only posts recovered as Giphy links.

posts.note: Image/GIF-only post, no caption. Original image recovered from Gabriel's ~/Downloads and copied here. Needs uploading to real photo storage at re-insertion time — this local path is not a servable URL.

posts.message: Wishing you both a lifetime of happiness and love. Congratulations!
May your marriage be filled with laughter, love, and endless adventures! Super happy for the both of you as you take this step into the next chapter!
Wishing you both a lifetime of happiness and love. Congratulations Harris!!!! All the best and hope you have the time of your life💒🥳🎉👏
Wish you both a very happy married life filled with lots of love. Congratulations and all the best. Cheers!
Wishing you both a lifetime of happiness and ever-growing love. Congratulations brother!
Hey Harris, congratulation to your new chapter in life! All the best and cheers!!
Congratulations Harris! Wishing you all the best in this new chapter!!
Congrats! Wishing you both a happy marriage!
Congratulations! Wishing you and your partner a lifetime of happiness, love, and laughter together. 🎉
Congrats Harris, hope your marriage is just like the best games of table tennis - exciting and always fun!
Congratulations! Harris.Wishing you both a wonderful life together
Congratulations!! All the best for this new chapter in life!

posts.note: GIF-only post, no caption. Link is the giphy.com page URL as given; app's existing seed data uses direct media.giphy.com/media/<id>/giphy.gif URLs, so this may need converting to that form at re-insertion time.

posts.message: Mabruk brother! May Allah bless you with a happy marriage!
